evals.prompt: I want to create a product-marketing-context.md file for my SaaS. It's a time tracking tool for law firms ($79/month per user, 50-200 employee firms). Our differentiator is automatic time capture — no manual entry. Competitors are Clio and TimeSolv. Can you help me build this document?
evals.expected_output: Structured product-marketing-context.md document with all required sections: product overview, ICP, personas, problems, differentiation, objections, customer language, brand voice, proof points, and goals.
assertions: Includes ICP section with firmographic details (law firms, 50-200 employees)
Captures the key differentiator (automatic time capture) prominently
Includes competitor positioning section (vs. Clio, vs. TimeSolv)
Asks clarifying questions for sections where information is missing
Produces output that other skills can read to avoid re-asking context questions

evals.prompt: Update our product-marketing-context.md — we just launched a new integration with QuickBooks and we want to add it as a proof point.
evals.expected_output: Reads the existing product-marketing-context.md, adds the QuickBooks integration to the appropriate sections (integrations, proof points, objection handling for accounting workflow questions).
assertions: Reads the existing file before making changes
Adds QuickBooks integration to proof points section
Updates integration/compatibility section if it exists
Notes implications for objection handling (accounting workflow questions)

evals.prompt: Write landing page copy for my time tracking tool
evals.expected_output: Offers to first create the product-marketing-context.md to ensure the copy is grounded in proper positioning, then redirects to copywriting skill for the actual page writing.
assertions: Redirects to copywriting skill for the actual landing page copy
Explains that context document makes subsequent copy more accurate
